benefits.description: Elbow tendonitis recovery - improved from 7/10 pain to 95% recovered in 2 weeks. Could not lift coffee cup 3 weeks prior, minimal tweak remaining when gripping golf club.
Dramatic reduction in joint pain allowing return to boxing and golfing.

protocol_notes: Local subcutaneous injections to affected elbow area. Initial injections to forearm above flexor, later injections to medial head of tricep. Used insulin pins and alcohol wipes. Concurrent therapy: reduced gym volume, modified movements (safety squat bar vs low bar squats), continued ice therapy daily, continued theragun use. Prior failed treatments: acupuncture, osteopath, rehab exercises, theragun/ART, hot/cold treatment. Source: UK Peptides. Cost ~£40 for 2 weeks treatment.
